task_description: Set up Vitest + React Testing Library testing infrastructure and write comprehensive unit/component tests for the Next.js task manager application, covering server actions and client components.

verification.summary: All 52 tests pass across 6 test files in 1.8s. Tests cover server actions (25 tests: createTask, updateTask, deleteTask, toggleTask, signOut, login, signup) and client components (24 tests: TaskList rendering/toggle/delete/edit, AddTaskForm rendering/validation/submission/errors). Lint passes with 1 minor warning. Build skipped (requires Supabase env vars). Docker build skipped (no Dockerfile).
